name: calculate
description: Safely evaluate a math expression and return the result.

expression.description: A mathematical expression to evaluate, e.g. '2 ** 10 + 5 * 3'.

name: get_system_info
description: Get current system information including OS, Python version, time.

sections.description: Which info sections to include: 'all', 'os', 'python', 'time'. Default 'all'.

name: run_command
description: Run a shell command on the host machine using pexpect and return the full captured output.

command.description: The shell command to execute, e.g. 'dir' or 'python --version'.

timeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the command to finish. Default 30.

name: spawn_and_interact
description: Spawn an interactive process and perform scripted expect/send conversation steps.

command.description: The executable or command to spawn.

interactions.description: Ordered list of interaction steps. Each step has optional 'expect' (pattern to wait for) and 'send' (text to type after match).
